metadata.source: EPA Air Quality System (AQS) daily data, aggregated to CBSA annual means

params.88101: PM2.5 (FRM/FEM), ug/m3, annual mean of daily means per site
params.44201: Ozone, ppm, annual mean of daily max 8-hr means per site

metadata.aggregation: CBSA mean = mean(per-year per-CBSA means); per-year per-CBSA mean = mean(site annual means)
